channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Forgejo - Tue May 12 12:33:41 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides Forgejo integration for JetBrains IDEs, including pull request listing, review comments, review submission, clone support, and token-based Git authentication.
vendor: JKamsker downloads: 4 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: dev.jkamsker.forgejo
